_note: Institutional visits and experiences during YPDS Jakarta 2026.

visits.name: Tugu Kunstkring Paleis
visits.description: Dinner reception at Jakarta's historic Kunstkring Paleis — an architectural gem blending heritage with contemporary diplomacy. Networking opportunity in an authentic Indonesian cultural setting.
highlights: Intimate networking with peers and mentors

visits.name: Regional Institutions & Policy Centers
visits.description: Guided visits to think tanks, policy institutes, and diplomatic missions in Jakarta showcasing regional cooperation frameworks.
